'''Harvey Barron''' (born 13 May 2003) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|wg}}er for [[Hull F.C.]] in the [[Super League]].

In 2022 he made his [[Hull F.C.|Hull]] début in the [[Super League]] against [[Toulouse Olympique]].<ref>[https://www.yorkshirepost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/toulouse-olympique-6-hull-fc-30-black-and-whites-win-eases-pressure-on-brett-hodgson-3787728 Toulouse Olympique 6 Hull FC 30 - Black and Whites win eases pressure on Brett Hodgson]</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=Harvey Barron - Career Stats & Summary |url=https://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/harvey-barron/summary.html |access-date=2023-02-20 |website=www.rugbyleagueproject.org}}</ref>
